skills.name: search-yilan-homestays
skills.description: Search and discover legal homestays in Yilan, Taiwan. Use when users ask about accommodations, lodging, or places to stay in Yilan. Supports filtering by area, features (family-friendly, pet-friendly, ocean view, private villa, pool, KTV, BBQ), capacity, and availability dates.

skills.name: get-yilan-travel-info
skills.description: Get Yilan travel articles, tourist spots, events, and coupons. Use when users ask about things to do in Yilan, tourist attractions, travel itineraries, local food, or discount coupons for Yilan.
